## Description / Excerpt

A MobiusSelf essay distinguishing plans from attractors and reframing direction as something grown through exposure, pull, and protected emergence rather than forced life design.

Excerpt:

## 1. The Planning Trap Most of us were taught—implicitly or explicitly—that a good life is one that is *planned*. We imagine futures. We pick goals. We commit. We execute. And for certain kinds of decisions, this works. If you must decide *today* whether to move, sign a contract
